##RRUFFID=R250038
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=[Pb_2_Zn(OH)_4_](SO_4_)·H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Redmond mine, Haywood County, North Carolina, USA
##OWNER=Natural History Museum of Los Angeles County
##SOURCE=Tony Kampf
##DESCRIPTION=Colorless to pale pink prisms or blades associated with cuprocherokeeite. Type sample from Kampf et al (2023)
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R250038
